summary: Verified Case History and Consent separation feature. Case History now has 10 sections (consent_disclaimer removed). Backend APIs work correctly - case history completes without consent fields and generates consent document for client signature.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: CaseHistoryForm.js SECTIONS array has exactly 10 sections (lines 16-27)
VERIFIED: consent_disclaimer section is NOT in SECTIONS array
VERIFIED: handleComplete() in CaseHistoryForm.js only validates name and main_problems (no consent checkbox)
VERIFIED: POST /api/case-history/{client_id}/complete creates consent document and notifies client
VERIFIED: ClientProfileView.js shows consent status: '⏳ Awaiting Signature' or '✓ Signed'
VERIFIED: ClientDashboard.js shows full-screen consent form when client logs in with pending consent

success_rate.frontend: Code verified - browser automation crashed due to resource constraints

context_for_next_testing_agent: Case History and Consent separation feature verified. All backend APIs work correctly. Browser automation crashes after login due to resource constraints - manual UI testing recommended.
